headline: Stock Market Today, April 16: Robinhood Slips as Schwab’s Crypto Push Raises New Competition
summary: Robinhood slipped as Schwab’s crypto push raised new competition, even as the SEC’s removal of the pattern day trader rule positions the platform for higher retail trading activity.

raw.summary: Robinhood slipped as Schwab’s crypto push raised new competition, even as the SEC’s removal of the pattern day trader rule positions the platform for higher retail trading activity.

headline: Coinbase Trading Above 50-Day SMA: Is it Time to Buy the Stock?
summary: Coinbase is trading above its 50-day SMA, but premium valuation and muted estimates make it a wait-and-see story for investors.

headline: 2 Mooning  Stocks Worth Your Attention and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: The stocks in this article are all trading near their 52-week highs. This strength often reflects positive developments such as new product launches, favorable industry trends, or improved financial performance.

headline: Schwab's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Trading & NIR, Shares Slide
summary: SCHW tops Q1 earnings and revenue estimates on stronger trading and net interest revenue, yet shares fall more than 2.5% premarket.

headline: Payoneer, Interactive Brokers, Ridgepost Capital, PayPal, and EVERTEC Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after major banks and asset managers reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations.
